title: Mazars Comment:How Chat GPT will change the world -and financial advice?
section_path: Mazars Comment:How Chat GPT will change the world -and financial advice?
section_path_text: Mazars Comment:How Chat GPT will change the world -and financial advice?
summary:
Main
Summary
Markets didn't move much last week, as investors mull over the possibility that the present rally may conflict with the harsh realities of rising interest rates and a swiftly decelerating economy. Google's stock lost 10%, nearly $100 Billion in market cap, after it's Bard AI made an error. Chat GPT is already changing the world.
